policy.battle_boundary: No battle or promotion opens before package resynthesis, scope reduction, candidate copy, strategy matrix, and replay gates.
policy.cut_boundary: This report does not reclassify any cut as value-safe.
policy.same_lane_boundary: Candidates must explicitly match the required add axis; incidental payoff text is not enough.
policy.source_lane_boundary: Same-lane add source candidates are evidence rows, not deck changes.
